lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਹੂਨੇ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਹੋਤ ਜਾਤ ਸਭੁ ਧੂਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naam bihoone naanakaa hot jaat sabh dhoor |1|
lines.english: Without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, O Nanak, all are reduced to dust. ||1||
DHADHA: The dust of the feet of the Saints is sacred.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਿ ਤੇਊ ਜਿਹ ਰੁਚ ਇਆ ਮਨੂਆ ॥
lines.translit: dhan teaoo jih ruch eaa manooaa |
lines.english: Blessed are those whose minds are filled with this longing.
Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਬਾਛਹਿ ਸੁਰਗ ਨ ਆਛਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: dhan nahee baachheh surag na aachheh |
lines.english: They do not seek wealth, and they do not desire paradise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਸਾਧ ਰਜ ਰਾਚਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: at pria preet saadh raj raacheh |
lines.english: They are immersed in the deep love of their Beloved, and the dust of the feet of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਏਕ ਛਾਡਿ ਅਨ ਕਤਹਿ ਨ ਜਾਹੂ ॥
lines.translit: jo ek chhaadd an kateh na jaahoo |
lines.english: Who do not abandon the One Lord, and who go nowhere else?
How can worldly affairs affect those,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਹੀਐ ਦੀਓ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai heeai deeo prabh naam |
lines.english: One whose heart is filled with God's Name,
O Nanak, is a perfect spiritual being of God. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਭਈ ਭਗਤੁ ਙਿਆਨੀ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak kirapaa bhee bhagat ngiaanee soe |1|
lines.english: Says Nanak, those upon whom God showers His Mercy, are devotees of spiritual wisdom. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਭੇਖ ਅਰੁ ਙਿਆਨ ਧਿਆਨ ਮਨਹਠਿ ਮਿਲਿਅਉ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: anik bhekh ar ngiaan dhiaan manahatth miliaau na koe |
lines.english: By all sorts of religious robes, knowledge, meditation and stubborn-mindedness, no one has ever met God.
Salok:
It is not obtained through the various debates of the Shaastras and scriptures.
Pauree:
NGANGA: Spiritual wisdom is not obtained by mere words of mouth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਙਿਆਨੀ ਸੋਇ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਦ੍ਰਿੜ ਸੋਊ ॥
lines.translit: ngiaanee soe jaa kai drirr soaoo |
lines.english: They alone are spiritually wise, whose minds are firmly fixed on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤ ਸੁਨਤ ਕਛੁ ਜੋਗੁ ਨ ਹੋਊ ॥
lines.translit: kehat sunat kachh jog na hoaoo |
lines.english: Hearing and telling stories, no one attains Yoga.

lines.gurmukhi: ਙਿਆਨੀ ਰਹਤ ਆਗਿਆ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੁ ਜਾ ਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: ngiaanee rehat aagiaa drirr jaa kai |
lines.english: They alone are spiritually wise, who remain firmly committed to the Lord's Command.
O Nanak, the Lord showers His Mercy upon them. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਸਨ ਸੀਤ ਸਮਸਰਿ ਸਭ ਤਾ ਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: ausan seet samasar sabh taa kai |
lines.english: Heat and cold are all the same to them.
The true people of spiritual wisdom are the Gurmukhs, who contemplate the essence of reality;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੋ ਬੁਝੈ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਭਾਗ ਮਥੋਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh so bujhai jaa kai bhaag mathor |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who become Gurmukh understand; upon their foreheads is such pre-ordained destiny. ||1||
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਨ ਆਏ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਮਹਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਬੂਝੇ ਪਸੁ ਢੋਰ ॥
lines.translit: aavan aae srisatt meh bin boojhe pas dtor |
lines.english: Those who have come into the world without understanding are like animals and beasts.
But ever since their birth, they have been enticed by the fascination of Maya.
Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਰਭ ਕੁੰਟ ਮਹਿ ਉਰਧ ਤਪ ਕਰਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: garabh kuntt meh uradh tap karate |
lines.english: Upside-down in the chamber of the womb, they performed intense meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਯਾ ਜੁਗ ਮਹਿ ਏਕਹਿ ਕਉ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: yaa jug meh ekeh kau aaeaa |
lines.english: They have come into this world to meditate on the One Lord.
They forget the Great Giver from their minds.
They remembered God in meditation with each and every breath.
But now, they are entangled in things which they must leave behind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਤ ਉਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਸਰਹੁ ਨਾਹੀ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: eit ut naanak tis bisarahu naahee |6|
lines.english: do not forget Him, here or hereafter. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਤ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਬਿਨਾਸ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਆਗਿਆ ਭਿੰਨ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aavat hukam binaas hukam aagiaa bhin na koe |
lines.english: By His Command, we come, and by His Command, we go; no one is beyond His Command.
O Nanak, those upon whom the Lord showers His Mercy,
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਨ ਜਾਨਾ ਤਿਹ ਮਿਟੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਹ ਮਨਿ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aavan jaanaa tih mittai naanak jih man soe |1|
lines.english: Coming and going in reincarnation is ended, O Nanak, for those whose minds are filled with the Lord. ||1||
This soul has lived in many wombs.
Pauree:
Enticed by sweet attachment, it has been trapped in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਨਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਬਸਿ ਕੀਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: ein maaeaa trai gun bas keene |
lines.english: This Maya has subjugated beings through the three qualities.
O friend, tell me some way,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੇ ਤਰਉ ਬਿਖਮ ਇਹ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jaa te trau bikham ih maaeaa |
lines.english: by which I may swim across this treacherous ocean of Maya.
The Lord showers His Mercy, and leads us to join the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation.
Maya has infused attachment to itself in each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਨ ਮਾਏ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak taa kai nikatt na maae |7|
lines.english: O Nanak, Maya does not even come near. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਤ ਕਮਾਵਨ ਸੁਭ ਅਸੁਭ ਕੀਨੇ ਤਿਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: kirat kamaavan subh asubh keene tin prabh aap |
lines.english: God Himself causes one to perform good and bad actions.
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਸੁ ਆਪਨ ਹਉ ਹਉ ਕਰੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਹਾ ਕਮਾਤਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: pas aapan hau hau karai naanak bin har kahaa kamaat |1|
lines.english: The beast indulges in egotism, selfishness and conceit; O Nanak, without the Lord, what can anyone do? ||1||
The One Lord Himself is the Cause of all actions.
Pauree:
He Himself distributes sins and noble acts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਆ ਜੁਗ ਜਿਤੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਆਪਹਿ ਲਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: eaa jug jit jit aapeh laaeo |
lines.english: In this age, people are attached as the Lord attaches them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸੋ ਪਾਇਓ ਜੁ ਆਪਿ ਦਿਵਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: so so paaeo ju aap divaaeo |
lines.english: They receive that which the Lord Himself gives.
From the One, the entire expanse of the Universe emanated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਆ ਕਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਨੈ ਕੋਊ ॥
lines.translit: auaa kaa ant na jaanai koaoo |
lines.english: No one knows His limits.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਕਰੈ ਸੋਊ ਫੁਨਿ ਹੋਊ ॥
lines.translit: jo jo karai soaoo fun hoaoo |
lines.english: Whatever He does, comes to pass.
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਚਿ ਰਹੇ ਬਨਿਤਾ ਬਿਨੋਦ ਕੁਸਮ ਰੰਗ ਬਿਖ ਸੋਰ ॥
lines.translit: raach rahe banitaa binod kusam rang bikh sor |
lines.english: Man remains engrossed in women and playful pleasures; the tumult of his passion is like the dye of the safflower, which fades away all too soon.
O Nanak, He Himself is our Saving Grace. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਹ ਸਰਨੀ ਪਰਉ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਜਾਇ ਮੈ ਮੋਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak tih saranee prau binas jaae mai mor |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, seek God's Sanctuary, and your selfishness and conceit shall be taken away. ||1||
